ksa_text: Implement and maintain security measures to mitigate or remediate identified vulnerabilities and security risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure all acquisitions, procurements, and outsourcing efforts address information security requirements consistent with organization goals.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nice.top_element_label: Integrate security requirements into application design elements

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Ensure all acquisitions, procurements, and outsourcing efforts address information security requirements consistent with organization goals.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-008 (Security and Privacy/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.440, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.440). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 data administration: data quality process execution under ISO standards, data records management, quality control procedures, and compliance documentation.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.440, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.440)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Administrator job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
